title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Extramarks Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Extramarks Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Extramarks Holdings Services in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Extramarks Holdings Services:
Extramarks Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks Holdings Services!
